{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323192837FE91962E900BD11DB743"}"},"total":286},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7447883391662375742","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"有智商的文，和别的国运文不一样。
没有直播和弹幕，尽可能地剔除了会对读者血压造成不好影响的因素，而是采用通关视频全球播放的方式。
角色都有认真塑造的痕迹，会为各自国家思考，而国家之间也在规则怪谈面前摒弃前嫌相互合作。
规则怪谈的设定也很合理，在闯关者失败后降临但只会持续到下一次怪谈。
国家之间的国界封闭，只能过物，国家们会对未通关陷入困难的国家捐助物资。
关卡难度也可以，在前期有着普通人的优秀通关案例，不只是只能靠主角开挂才能过关；后期难度提升的同时也给各位闯关者都开放了一些福利，可以增加成活率。
闯关者的人选可以被国家指定，国家未指定后才是随机，因此各位闯关者都是国家的精英，都有各自的本事和智商，同时人品都过关（个别是被怪谈折磨疯了），在怪谈里会相互合作，这是看书很舒服的一点。
闯关者不论生死都会被国家厚待视为英雄，失败的不会被人民指责（有不懂事的也早就被扔进监狱了），而是被厚葬入烈士陵园，会有国家高层参加葬礼表示慰问。
简而言之，在屎里淘书的番茄里，本书上佳，是番茄同人的仙品粮草。","text_exts":[{"e":97,"s":93,"text":"规则怪谈","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E6%80%AA%E8%B0%88&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774265317D11DB743%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227447883391662375742%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227306762823571360830%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E6%80%AA%E8%B0%88%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1734099531,"group_id":"7306762823571360830","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5w3yCNsnLKbfiXm6kAu4t3N5k2fl9Q/4brR+VQK8+6w","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3e279d5e7a254cc8a511b96ce8fa321a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791196&x-signature=JFdRp7qYhS6kRWbTZoO8BILIu0I%3D","user_id":"4325899182551136","user_name":"爱莉只有一个"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4325899182551136","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7306762823571360830","book_info":{"abstract":"【角色穿越+规则怪谈+推理+成长+搞笑+国运+团结+配角有脑子......】
【关于藿藿与尾巴大爷，里面掺了些不少的私设。】　　

　　怪谈游戏悄然降临蓝星。

　　每个国家将被规则怪谈强制参加一场死亡怪谈游戏。

　　一天，胆小的藿藿与银河球棒执行任务时，两人来到一间全是铜镜的房间。

　　当她们决定好，穿过一面铜镜，唯有藿藿误打误撞的被传送到了龙国，紧接着又被规则怪谈锁定，成为了一名怪谈玩家。

　　至此，倒霉胆小的藿藿与尾巴大爷不得不遵守规则怪谈，去通关一个又一个恐怖怪谈......

　　“在恐惧的时候，可以大笑来驱散恐惧，就像这样，嚯嚯嚯嚯嚯嚯........”

　　“鬼、鬼啊！！！尾巴.....救救.....”

　　“听到了听到了，真是吵死了。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2ofc4043c23f1d25a3b841506534e6d0b0~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"不行就开摆","author_id":"","book_id":"7306762823571360830","book_name":"藿藿与尾巴的怪谈之旅","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#102020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1772人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":61,"name":"推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=61&name=推理&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":496,"name":"国运","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=496&name=国运&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":851,"name":"规则怪谈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=851&name=规则怪谈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7306762871315120702","read_count":"1772","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"514192"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.1","serial_count":"277","tags":"悬疑脑洞,穿越,推理,国运,搞笑轻松,规则怪谈,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0245de77410f5751b19dfa8affe1d6b5~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779449318&x-signature=7tTmnLmVl58l9HlNhzhyzsVySI0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1764036027617182","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"222"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323192837FE91962E900BD11DB743"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":35,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":21848,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3009},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7458099539479364414","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"怪诞小说里面最推荐的一本，其实努努力能到9.0的评分的，估计是作者比较短一些吧，藿藿人格还原度可以，而且各个国家的玩家也都是有着人类命运共同体意识的，和其他书不同，别的国家去龙国直播间嘲讽然后被打脸，一个个的表现就整的貌似除了龙国的，别的选手就没脑子这玩意似的。这本看着挺舒服的，有好人也有坏人，有龙套也有值得铭记的人，不过……这应该算群像吧，并不是藿藿单独乱杀的爽文，而是藿藿和他人一起努力挣扎活下去的故事。其实还可以再优化优化，读的时候就有这种感觉，一些地方修改修改能提升很大的阅读体验。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1736482256,"group_id":"7306762823571360830","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一个普普通通的新人作者，喜欢二次元","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/+/28nr7lO8V8jjt+RdrgcRPIGoY4pxylWdHcYoHbuh","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3699213582999309","user_name":"玄策冥纪"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3699213582999309","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7306762823571360830","book_info":{"abstract":"【角色穿越+规则怪谈+推理+成长+搞笑+国运+团结+配角有脑子......】

　　一天，胆小的藿藿与银河球棒执行任务时，两人来到一间全是铜镜的房间。
